sections.paragraph:
βραδυπλοέω (Artem. 4, 30; Anecd. Gr. p. 225, 15; cp. βραδυπλοία in POxy 2191, 8 [II a.d.]) sail slowly Ac 27:7.—M-M.

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 183
